summary: Tested admin dashboard mobile responsiveness - ALL TESTS PASSED. No horizontal overflow on any admin tab (375px mobile width).

delivery_tab.description: Card-based layout showing driver name, phone, city, status badge. No horizontal scroll.

users_tab.description: Card-based layout showing user name, date, phone, city. No horizontal scroll.

sellers_tab.description: Card-based layout showing seller name, store name, phone, city, status. No horizontal scroll.

drivers_map_tab.description: Shows driver stats (total, online, available, with_orders, with_location), filters, and Leaflet map. No horizontal scroll.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 admin tabs verified for mobile responsiveness at 375px viewport width. Card-based layouts work correctly: DeliveryTab, UsersTab, SellersTab, DriversMapTab. No horizontal overflow issues found. API /api/delivery/admin/all-drivers-locations works and returns driver locations and stats.

screenshots_taken: delivery_tab_v2.png - Shows card layout with driver info
users_tab_v2.png - Shows card layout with user info
sellers_tab_v2.png - Shows card layout with seller info
driversmap_tab_v2.png - Shows stats cards and Leaflet map
